lifecycleScripts.afterStart:
npx @wordpress/env run cli sh -c 'mkdir -p ~/.composer/vendor/bin && printf "#!/bin/sh
# Ghostscript stand-in: WP_Debug_Data (Site Health) execs gs --version when the plugin gathers system info; empty output reports Ghostscript as not available, without sh: gs: not found noise in the Pest output.
exit 127
" > ~/.composer/vendor/bin/gs && chmod +x ~/.composer/vendor/bin/gs'
